headline: How Improving Sales Trends Changed Wall Street’s Tone on Chipotle (CMG)
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG) is one of the stocks most affected by inflation. On March 6, 2026, DA Davidson initiated coverage of Chipotle with a Buy rating and a $51 price target. The firm said Chipotle could see a significant rebound in fiscal 2026, driven by multiple sales initiatives, and said comparable sales trends […]

headline: CMG Announces the Acquisition of Rose Subsurface Assessment
summary: Expands CMG’s capabilities to probabilistic subsurface risk and resource assessmentCALGARY, Alberta, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Computer Modelling Group Ltd. (“CMG” or the “Company”) (TSX: CMG) today announces that it has acquired Rose Subsurface Assessment (“Rose”), a globally recognized provider of probabilistic subsurface risk analysis and resource assessment software, training, consulting, and operator consortium services for the global exploration and production industry.
